summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VerbaEdge MVP - Voice-Based AI Interview Simulation Platform. Tested landing page, authentication pages, backend APIs, and frontend integration.

minor_issues.issue: Return 401 instead of 404 for invalid routes when unauthenticated

ui_bugs.issue: High-pressure mode card has data-testid with space instead of hyphen
Navigation buttons may not be fully visible on mobile viewport

issues: Clerk deprecation warnings for afterSignInUrl and afterSignUpUrl props

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, modes, how it works, CTA)
Navigation buttons work correctly (Sign In, Get Started)
Sign In page loads with Clerk authentication (Google + Email options)
Sign Up page loads with Clerk authentication
Backend health endpoint returns correct response
Backend config endpoint returns Vapi and Clerk keys
Authentication properly enforced on protected endpoints
Responsive design works on mobile and tablet
No JavaScript errors on page load

success_percentage.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 expected 'failure' due to security)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - minor selector and mobile nav issues)

medium_priority: Update Clerk authentication props from deprecated afterSignInUrl/afterSignUpUrl to fallbackRedirectUrl/forceRedirectUrl
Fix mobile navigation visibility on small screens
Standardize data-testid naming convention (use hyphens consistently)
low_priority: Fix high-pressure mode card data-testid to use hyphen instead of space
